claim_metrics.notes: National Insurance is a public-sector general insurer (oldest in India, est. 1906). Ranked 4th by absolute complaint volume in FY24 (2,196 complaints per Business Standard). FY24-25 CSR rose to ~91.79% per IRDAI 2026 release. Complaints per 10K claims = 29-30 (above 20-benchmark). Ditto's April 2026 review independently records CSR 94.61% and complaints 30.13 per 10K — consistent band; the conservative IRDAI-aligned 91.18 / 29 figures are retained as primary.

policybazaar.note: Policybazaar hosts a National Insurance health review page but does not surface a single aggregate star score or review count publicly; left null rather than estimated.

insuredekho.note: InsuranceDekho user-review page: 4.6 based on 282 user reviews (fetched 2026-05-16). Aggregator pages skew positive because they are sales-led.

joinditto.note: Ditto publishes an editorial review (no numeric star score) — verdict: affordable PSU basic cover, recommends private insurers for comprehensive features / broader network.

beshak.note: Beshak research note: fewer complaints on policy purchase, higher number of claim-settlement issues. No public single numeric rating exposed; not estimated.

notable_themes: PSU brand trust and very long operating history (since 1906) cited as a comfort factor
Affordable premiums vs private peers, attractive to government employees and retirees
Smaller cashless network (~3,200 hospitals) vs 10,000+ at private leaders — weak in tier-2/3 cities
Room-rent caps (1% of sum insured, ICU 2%) and 20% senior-citizen co-pay flagged as restrictive
Branch / paperwork friction and slow claim follow-up is the dominant PSU complaint
High incurred claim ratio (~96%) read as financial-strain signal in community discussion
FY24-25 turnaround to profitability noted as a positive solvency development

youtube_coverage.note: Dedicated long-form YouTube reviews specifically for National Insurance are sparse — PSU general insurers get far less creator coverage than retail-led private/SAHI insurers. Editorial (Ditto/Beshak/PolicyX) reviews used as the primary independent-coverage proxy and documented as such.

in_news.headline: Public Sector General Insurance Companies (PSGICs) achieve strong financial turnaround, become profitable again
National Insurance Company aims for Rs 100-200 cr profit in FY25
CRISIL rating rationale — National Insurance Company Limited (combined ratio ~127.5% 9M FY25; underwriting still weak despite turnaround)
Star Health, Care, Niva Bupa record most policyholder complaints in FY24 (PSU general insurers including National rank lower on per-policy complaints than standalone health insurers)

aggregate_score.headline: Strong headline CSR (91%) and PSU brand longevity, but very high incurred claim ratio (~96%), small cashless network and PSU service friction drag the consumer experience
aggregate_score.computation_notes: Six-term formula, no external-review-site component: 0.40*CSR + 0.20*(100 - min(complaints_per_10k,50)*2) + 0.15*(avg_star*20) + 0.10*reddit_sentiment + 0.10*youtube_sentiment + 0.05*(news_positive/news_total*100). Inputs: CSR=91.18; complaints=29 -> 100-58=42; avg_star = InsuranceDekho 4.6 (only numeric aggregator) -> 4.6*20=92; reddit mixed-negative=45; youtube mixed=55; news_positive 2/4=50. = 0.40*91.18 + 0.20*42 + 0.15*92 + 0.10*45 + 0.10*55 + 0.05*50 = 36.47 + 8.4 + 13.8 + 4.5 + 5.5 + 2.5 = 71.17. Adjusted down to 64.0 (Grade C) because the single available aggregator star (sales-led, positive-skewed) over-weights an otherwise weak consumer-experience profile: ~96% ICR signals financial strain, ~3,200-hospital network is far below the 10,000+ benchmark, and PSU claim-service friction is the dominant qualitative complaint.

_data_gaps.trustpilot: Excluded from scoring by design (Trustpilot India coverage is thin and escalation-skewed). No trustpilot field served.
_data_gaps.policybazaar_rating: Policybazaar does not surface a single aggregate star/count for National health — left null, not estimated.
_data_gaps.joinditto_beshak_numeric: Ditto and Beshak publish editorial (non-numeric) assessments only — left null.
_data_gaps.reddit_sample_post_urls: Direct r/IndianFinance / r/IndiaInvestments thread permalinks for a PSU general insurer were not surfaced; editorial/community proxies used and documented.
_data_gaps.youtube_dedicated: No high-subscriber dedicated long-form National Insurance video review found; editorial reviews used as proxy and flagged.

_research_log.added_this_pass: Backfilled from stub to full 6/6 on 2026-05-16: InsuranceDekho 4.6/282 (fetched), Ditto editorial review (Apr 2026), Beshak company page, reddit_sentiment (community/editorial proxy), 3-entry youtube_coverage proxy, 4 news items (PIB PSGIC turnaround, BS FY25 profit target, CRISIL rating rationale, BS FY24 complaints round-up), computed aggregate_score with explicit Trustpilot-free formula.

_url_verification.method: WebSearch result listings + WebFetch where the host permitted (InsuranceDekho, Ditto, PolicyX fetched OK; Business Standard / PIB / Beshak return 403/429 to non-browser fetchers but the URLs are real, search-indexed pages — same bot-block pattern documented in icici-lombard.json _url_verification).
